songs.title: Stacy's Mom
songs.album: I've Never Done Anything Like This
feed: “Stacy's Mom” by Bowling for Soup returns to #1 in the Personal Hot 100 for a 3rd nonconsecutive week at the top.
“Stacy's Mom” by Bowling for Soup is the #1 best selling song in Personal Hot 100 this week with 102 sales units.
“Stacy's Mom” by Bowling for Soup is the #1 most streamed song in Personal Hot 100 this week with 170 streams units.
“Stacy's Mom” by Bowling for Soup is the #1 overall units gainer in Personal Hot 100 this week with 393,477 total units.

songs.title: Wake Me Up When September Ends
feed: “Wake Me Up When September Ends” by Green Day climbs inside the top 5 of Personal Hot 100, rising 4 spots to #3.
“Wake Me Up When September Ends” by Green Day is the #1 most airplayed song in Personal Hot 100 this week with 4 airplay units.

songs.title: Always

feed: “Thunder” by Boys Like Girls reaches a new peak in Personal Hot 100, rising 36 spots to #8.

“Thunder” by Boys Like Girls is the biggest position gainer in Personal Hot 100 this week, rising 36 spots to #8.
